feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Blocking "minimum stock" field from Item Master Data for a user
entry.content:
Hello experts,

there's a user that keeps editing without noticing the minimum stock required of an item. Is there a way to block this field (marked in yellow in my screenshot)?

The user needs to have access to other data in the item master data sheet, its just this field that should be blocked. 

What options do we have?

Thank you!!

entry.title: Sevice Layer WTLiable for BPWithholdingTaxCollection
entry.content:
Hello Guys,
I'm working with SL to create/update BP Master data but if I try to populate the BPWithholdingTaxCollection (table CRD4 for supplier only) the PTACH returns no errors but my target CRD4 is empty.

I've identified the reason: I can correctly populate BPWithholdingTaxCollection only if previously and manually I'll activate the check "WTLiable" in the master data, section Accounting\Tax before PATCH it.


I don't find a SL fields exposed for WTLiable tYES/tNO in the main BusinessPartner (OCRD.WTLiable).

Someone should tell me if it exists and which is the extension.name ?

Thank you in advance!!

entry.title: Account Code and Name Query with Parent and Child in same Row
entry.content:
Hello Experts

I found an awesome query which I managed to modify to suit, but need it modified a bit more and I havent been able to resolve it, a bit out of my capacity and i am not sure if it can be achieved

So, what I need is the results to show the Parent part number and names to be repeated so that the parent code and name and in the same rows as the child code and names
I have attached two txt files one with the Actual results I get when I run the query, and one txt file which what is my expectation of the results when I run the query (for privacy reasons I have cleared the data from names columns)
Below is the query (i tried to upload the files in Excel format, but unable to do so, hence had to save as txt)

 

SELECT 
    TBL1.[GROUP],
    TBL1.[Main Account] AS [Main Account],
    TBL1.[Main Account Name] AS [Main Account Name],
    TBL1.[Sub Account] AS [Sub Account],
    TBL1.[Sub Account Name] AS [Sub Account Name],
    TBL1.[Detailed Account] AS [Detailed Account],
    TBL1.[Detailed Account Name] AS [Detailed Account Name],
    TBL1.[Segmented Account] AS [Segmented Account],
    TBL1.[Segmented Account Name] AS [Segmented Account Name],
    TBL1.[Sub-Segmented Account] AS [Sub-Segmented Account],
    TBL1.[Sub-Segmented Account Name] AS [Sub-Segmented Account Name]
FROM (
    SELECT 
        t0.groupmask, 
        t0.grpline, 
        t0.levels, 
        T0.[AcctCode] AS [Main Account], 
        T0.[AcctName] AS [Main Account Name],
        '-' AS [Sub Account], 
        '-' AS [Sub Account Name],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account Name],
        T0.[Segment_0] + '-' + T0.[Segment_1] + '-' + T0.[Segment_2] AS [Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Segmented Account Name],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account Name],
        (CASE T0.[GroupMask] 
            WHEN 1 THEN 'Asset' 
            WHEN 2 THEN 'Liabilities' 
            WHEN 3 THEN 'Equity' 
            WHEN 4 THEN 'Revenue' 
            WHEN 5 THEN 'COGS' 
            WHEN 6 THEN 'Expenses' 
            WHEN 7 THEN 'Other Income & Expense' 
        END) AS [GROUP]
    FROM OACT T0 
    WHERE t0.Levels = '1'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        t0.groupmask,
        t0.grpline,
        t0.levels,
        '-',
        '-',
        T0.[AcctCode] AS [Sub Account], 
        T0.[AcctName] AS [Sub Account Name],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account Name],
        '-' AS [Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Segmented Account Name],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account Name],
        (CASE T0.[GroupMask] 
            WHEN 1 THEN 'Asset' 
            WHEN 2 THEN 'Liabilities' 
            WHEN 3 THEN 'Equity' 
            WHEN 4 THEN 'Revenue' 
            WHEN 5 THEN 'COGS' 
            WHEN 6 THEN 'Expenses' 
            WHEN 7 THEN 'Other Income & Expense' 
        END) AS [GROUP]
    FROM OACT T0 
    WHERE t0.Levels = '2'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        t0.groupmask,
        t0.grpline,
        t0.levels,
        '-',
        '-',
        '-' AS [Sub Account],
        '-' AS [Sub Account Name],
        T0.[AcctCode] AS [Detailed Account], 
        T0.[AcctName] AS [Detailed Account Name],
        '-' AS [Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Segmented Account Name],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account Name],
        (CASE T0.[GroupMask] 
            WHEN 1 THEN 'Asset' 
            WHEN 2 THEN 'Liabilities' 
            WHEN 3 THEN 'Equity' 
            WHEN 4 THEN 'Revenue' 
            WHEN 5 THEN 'COGS' 
            WHEN 6 THEN 'Expenses' 
            WHEN 7 THEN 'Other Income & Expense' 
        END) AS [GROUP]
    FROM OACT T0 
    WHERE t0.Levels = '3'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        t0.groupmask,
        t0.grpline,
        t0.levels,
        '-',
        '-',
        '-' AS [Sub Account],
        '-' AS [Sub Account Name],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account Name],
        T0.[Segment_0] + '-' + T0.[Segment_1] + '-' + T0.[Segment_2] AS [Segmented Account],
        T0.[AcctName] AS [Segmented Account Name],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Sub-Segmented Account Name],
        (CASE T0.[GroupMask] 
            WHEN 1 THEN 'Asset' 
            WHEN 2 THEN 'Liabilities' 
            WHEN 3 THEN 'Equity' 
            WHEN 4 THEN 'Revenue' 
            WHEN 5 THEN 'COGS' 
            WHEN 6 THEN 'Expenses' 
            WHEN 7 THEN 'Other Income & Expense' 
        END) AS [GROUP]
    FROM OACT T0 
    WHERE t0.Levels = '4'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        t0.groupmask,
        t0.grpline,
        t0.levels,
        '-',
        '-',
        '-' AS [Sub Account],
        '-' AS [Sub Account Name],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account],
        '-' AS [Detailed Account Name],
        '-' AS [Segmented Account],
        '-' AS [Segmented Account Name],
        T0.[Segment_0] + '-' + T0.[Segment_1] + '-' + T0.[Segment_2] AS [Sub-Segmented Account], 
        T0.[AcctName] AS [Sub-Segmented Account Name],
        (CASE T0.[GroupMask] 
            WHEN 1 THEN 'Asset' 
            WHEN 2 THEN 'Liabilities' 
            WHEN 3 THEN 'Equity' 
            WHEN 4 THEN 'Revenue' 
            WHEN 5 THEN 'COGS' 
            WHEN 6 THEN 'Expenses' 
            WHEN 7 THEN 'Other Income & Expense' 
        END) AS [GROUP]
    FROM OACT T0 
    WHERE t0.Levels = '5'
) TBL1
ORDER BY
    TBL1.groupmask,
    TBL1.grpline,
    TBL1.levels

 





Regards
Rah

entry.title: How to expose on-premise SAP B1 service layer with signed SSL cert
entry.content:
Hello,

We have SAP B1 on-premise and I would like expose the service layer externally with a valid domain and SSL. how to do it? Thank you

entry.title: VPN Bandwidth for RDP to SAP Remote Server from Home`
entry.content:
Hi All

Our client has set up a remote server with SAP B1 client application and users outside the network can use the SAP B1 client through a VPN connection.

Any advice on the maximum acceptable latency and required bandwidth for optimizing smooth connection for the above setup? 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Credit note automatically deducted from invoice balance
entry.content:
SAP B1 v10

Good afternoon,

When a credit note is created from an existing invoice, it automatically reduces the open balance. Is there a way around this? They are two documents with unique identifiers, but on Account balance or Internal reconciliation it is one line with balance and balance due. Sometime I need to be able to use just the credit note or the full original invoice value, particularly when allocating payments of course.

For example, if I issue a credit note to a customer for an invoice not yet due, more often than not that will be deducted from a payment before the customer has to pay the actual invoice. This means I have to leave a balance on another invoice until the original invoice is paid. Is there a better solution?

Hopefully this makes sense!

Thanks.

entry.title: writing approval condition
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am trying to write an approval query to send vendor invoices without a base document for approval, but since the BaseType field is not a physical field, I cannot see the item and column numbers. How should I write the query? Writing it as $[$OPCH."BaseType"] does not work. Please help me. 

Regards,

entry.title: Difference between first bin location and default bin location in item master data
entry.content:
Hi Community, 

I am finding it difficult to understand the difference between "first bin location" and "default bin location" which comes under inventory tab in item master data screen, please do tell the difference between them.


Thank you

entry.title: Warehouse cannot always be changed in A/R Credit Memo
entry.content:
Hi,

When you copy a Sales Return to a A/R Credit Memo, the warehouse is not editable in the A/R Credit Memo. The column appears blocked, while it is active in the forum settings.

When you copy an A/R Invoice to a Credit Memo, you can change te warehouse in the A/R Credit Memo.

Why is there a difference and can this be changed somewhere in the settings?

entry.title: A/R Reserve Invoice payment through Bank Statement Processing - HOW?
entry.content:
In SAP B1 an A/R Reserve Invoice has been issued, but we are unable to properly record the incoming customer payment through 'Bank Statement Processing.'
There is no 'Proposal for uncleared rows.' I tried adjusting the dates, but the specific A/R Reserve Invoice in question never appears. Any help would be greatly appreciated

entry.title: SSO on Web Client
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We have implemented SSO on SAP B1 2405. It works fine with B1 client, however it is not working properly on web client (tested via Chrome and Edge). Note that the login itself works in web client, but we need to enter login data manually. Is it possible to enable automatic authentication with windows user (the same way it works in B1 client)?

entry.title: Production Receipt performed without performing issue from production
entry.content:
Performed production receipt from Production order without performing issue from production and now after performing issue from production Actual Product Cost is showing 0 under summary tab of production order , is there any way to revert back the document so that Actual Product Cost can show the proper amount ?

Need guidance in this.

entry.title: SAP Analytics cloud embedded in SAP Business One on premise
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

The client has requested the possibility of displaying a story created in SAC within Business One. We assume it would need to be done with Single Sign-On so that it automatically connects the SAP user to SAC.

We have serious doubts about whether this is feasible. Does anyone know how this could be achieved? If it is possible, would the security applied in SAC through DACs in the dimensions remain intact when embedding it in Business One?

Thank you very much in advance.

Best regards.

entry.title: SAP B1 Minimised Windows Issue
entry.content:
Hello

On SAP B1 when a document/window is minimised it no longer show the text in the tabs along the bottom. Does anyone know how to restore this?

Many thanks.

entry.title: Going to import item master details through DTW
entry.content:
Hello Community ,

Please let me know how to upload item groups through DTW

Thank you

entry.title: When uploading item from DTW , system generating error about customer code
entry.content:
Hello Community ,

There is a scenario where I am facing an error 
Uploading the item from DTW , ran the simulation and system shown no error, 100% successful
Then after importing , DTW generated error " 2 Created Failed A002 (400100) Customer Code length needs to be 10 digit. (400100) Customer Code length needs to be 10 digit.oItems "

Not able to figure out the reason behind this

entry.title: Failed to get access token, contact your administrator
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

B1 Version:10.0 FP2208

I’m using the SAP client to log in, but I get the error code “Failed to get access token, contact your administrator.” This error only occurs on my local machine; the SAP server can log in successfully.

Could I be missing some settings on the SAP server? I need help resolving this issue.

Best Regards

entry.title: SAP B1 Bin Location Storage suggestion algorithm
entry.content:
Hello,

Based on a requirement from a customer, we have bin locations, each with a specific format type.

Let’s take an example with the format: PAL.

We would like the system to calculate the volume for each item with the PAL format. The calculation would be based on the formula:
UVF = (Height x Width x Length) x Quantity

The system should then suggest the best bin location with the PAL format that is not already full.

For example:

  • Bin Location A-01, format: PAL, is currently at 90% of its maximum Unit of Volume Format (UVF).
  • Bin Location A-02, format: PAL, is at 20% of its UVF.

If we have an item with a volume of 20 UVF, the system would propose storing it in A-02, as it has more available capacity.

Regarding the system's ability to make such proposals, this functionality would require development. However, I would like to know how this could be achieved using SBO transactions or procedures.

Thanks,

entry.title: How to Install SSL Certificate for SAP B1 Web Browser Access
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to install an SSL certificate for SAP Business One 10 web browser access, I have a Public IP address. How can I do this?

entry.title: Error when creating Production Order
entry.content:
Hello Community,


When creating purchase order , system is generating this error " No matching records found 'Warehouses' (OWHS) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]"

Any idea about this ?
